headline: Old Dominion Freight Line Analysts Increase Their Forecasts Following Strong Q1 Earnings
summary: ODFL reported strong Q1 2026 results, with revenue of $1.335 billion and net income of $238.3 million. Analysts raised price targets on the stock.

raw.headline: Old Dominion Freight Line Analysts Increase Their Forecasts Following Strong Q1 Earnings
raw.summary: ODFL reported strong Q1 2026 results, with revenue of $1.335 billion and net income of $238.3 million. Analysts raised price targets on the stock.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Old Dominion Freight Line, Raises Price Target to $219
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Jonathan Chappell   maintains Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $201 to $219.
